metadata.description: Frankencoin is a collateral-backed stablecoin pegged to the Swiss Franc (CHF). Users deposit collateral (WBTC, wstETH, LsETH, cbBTC, and others) into positions via the MintingHub to mint ZCHF, while the Equity token (FPS) represents governance rights and a share of the protocol's reserve pool. All core protocol contracts are immutable, with governance limited to FPS holders who can propose changes to Savings parameters. The protocol bridges to other CHF stablecoins (XCHF, VCHF) via immutable StablecoinBridge contracts and supports cross-chain transfers through Chainlink CCIP infrastructure. Total ZCHF market cap is $25.59M, with $64.47M in active collateral positions.

admins.name: MintingHub (Legacy)
admins.description: Immutable protocol contract registered as an active minter on the Frankencoin token. Can call registerPosition, mint, mintWithReserve, burnFrom, burnWithReserve, burnFromWithReserve, burnWithoutReserve, coverLoss, and collectProfits. This is the older MintingHub, no longer actively used but still registered as a minter with $0 in remaining positions.

admins.name: StablecoinBridge (XCHF)
admins.description: Immutable bridge contract that allows 1:1 conversion between XCHF (CryptoFranc) and ZCHF. Registered as an active minter, it can mint and burn ZCHF. The bridge holds XCHF as backing for ZCHF minted through it.

admins.name: Savings (Legacy)
admins.description: Immutable older Savings contract registered as an active minter. Can mint ZCHF to pay interest to depositors. Holds $21.39K in ZCHF deposits. Parameters can be changed by qualified FPS holders via proposeChange.

admins.name: PositionRoller
admins.description: Immutable protocol contract that enables rolling (migrating) collateral positions between MintingHub versions. Registered as an active minter, though its roll/rollFully/rollFullyWithExpiration functions have been scored as no-impact.

admins.name: MintingHub (Current)
admins.description: Immutable protocol contract and the primary entry point for creating collateral-backed positions. Registered as an active minter, it manages $64.47M across 51 active positions. Functions including openPosition, challenge, bid, and buyExpiredCollateral are gated by Equity (FPS) token holder qualification.

admins.name: StablecoinBridge (VCHF)
admins.description: Immutable bridge contract enabling 1:1 conversion between VCHF (VNX Franc) and ZCHF. Registered as an active minter, holding $501.29K in VCHF reserves. If the VCHF token is paused, frozen, or upgraded by VNX, this bridge's minting and burning would be affected.

admins.name: Savings (Current)
admins.description: Immutable current Savings contract where users deposit ZCHF to earn interest. Registered as an active minter, holding $9.13M in ZCHF. Interest rate parameters can be changed by qualified FPS holders via proposeChange.

admins.name: Zero Address (Renounced)
admins.description: The zero address holds the newOwner role on CryptoFranc (acceptOwnership) and the migrationFromContract reference (migrateFrom). These permissions are effectively renounced and cannot be exercised.

admins.name: Equity (FPS Token)
admins.description: The Frankencoin governance token contract. FPS holders who meet qualification criteria can call openPosition, challenge, bid, and buyExpiredCollateral on the MintingHub. The Equity contract itself can call kamikaze (self-destruct of shares) and restructureCapTable. It also controls functions on an unknown contract (0xf72e...6Ba6) including setMinterRole, mint, freeze, pause, and setAssetProtectionRole. Holds $14.08M in reserves.

dependencies.name: VNXCToken (VCHF)
dependencies.description: VNX Franc stablecoin, an upgradeable ERC-20 (EIP-1967 proxy) used by the StablecoinBridge for 1:1 VCHF-to-ZCHF conversion. The VCHF token can be paused, frozen per-address, or upgraded by VNX, which would block StablecoinBridge mint/burn operations. Critical dependency for the VCHF bridge path.

dependencies.name: Chainlink RBACTimelock
dependencies.description: Chainlink-operated timelock (3h delay) that owns the ARMProxy and CryptoFranc contracts. Chainlink can modify CCIP configuration and CryptoFranc parameters after the timelock delay. Uses role-based access with PROPOSER, EXECUTOR, CANCELLER, and BYPASSER roles.

dependencies.name: VNX Proxy Admin
dependencies.description: Proxy admin for the VCHF token, controlled by an EOA (0x7B0C...9403). Can upgrade the VCHF token implementation without a timelock, which would directly affect the VCHF StablecoinBridge.

dependencies.name: CryptoFranc (XCHF)
dependencies.description: CryptoFranc token used by the StablecoinBridge for 1:1 XCHF-to-ZCHF conversion. XCHF is an immutable token but has centralized controls: it can be paused, its minter and operator can be changed, and token migrations can be initiated. Owned by a Chainlink RBACTimelock (3h delay), with minting controlled by a 3/6 XCHF multisig.

dependencies.name: Chainlink ARMProxy
dependencies.description: Chainlink Active Risk Management proxy used by the PositionRoller and MintingHub for cross-chain position operations. Owned by the Chainlink RBACTimelock.

dependencies.name: XCHF Owner 3/4 Multisig
dependencies.description: A 3-of-4 GnosisSafe multisig that owns the CryptoFranc token through the Chainlink RBACTimelock. Controls CryptoFranc ownership transfer, operator assignment, migration, pause/unpause, and minter role changes.

dependencies.name: XCHF Minter 3/6 Multisig
dependencies.description: A 3-of-6 GnosisSafe multisig with the minter role on CryptoFranc. Can mint new XCHF tokens, which could be bridged to ZCHF via the StablecoinBridge.

dependencies.name: XCHF Operator 3/6 Multisig
dependencies.description: A 3-of-6 GnosisSafe multisig with the operator role on CryptoFranc. Can announce rollovers and refund foreign tokens.

dependencies.name: Chainlink TransferReference
dependencies.description: Chainlink CCIP infrastructure contract that enables cross-chain ZCHF transfers. Registered as an active minter on the Frankencoin token, meaning it can mint and burn ZCHF for bridging operations.

dependencies.name: Chainlink BurnMintTokenPool
dependencies.description: Chainlink CCIP token pool that handles burn/mint operations for cross-chain ZCHF transfers. Registered as an active minter on the Frankencoin token.

dependencies.name: Chainlink BridgeAccounting
dependencies.description: Chainlink CCIP accounting contract tracking cross-chain ZCHF supply. Registered as an active minter on the Frankencoin token.

dependencies.name: Chainlink RBACTimelock (RMNRemote)
dependencies.description: A second Chainlink RBACTimelock (3h delay) that owns the RMNRemote contract. Controls RMNRemote configuration, curse/uncurse operations, and ownership transfer.

funds.name: Frankencoin (ZCHF Token)
funds.description: The ZCHF stablecoin token contract itself with a market cap of $25.59M. ZCHF is pegged to the Swiss Franc and backed by collateral locked in MintingHub positions, XCHF/VCHF reserves in StablecoinBridges, and the Equity reserve pool.

funds.name: Equity (FPS Reserve Pool)
funds.description: The FPS governance token contract that also serves as the protocol's reserve pool. Holds $14.08M primarily in ZCHF, representing the system's equity buffer that absorbs losses from undercollateralized liquidations.

funds.name: MintingHub (Current Positions)
funds.description: The active MintingHub managing 51 collateral positions worth $64.47M in aggregate. Positions are backed by WBTC, cbBTC, wstETH, LsETH, BOSS, PAXG, XAUt, WETH, GNO, CRV, and other collateral types.

funds.name: Savings (Current)
funds.description: The current Savings contract holding $9.13M in ZCHF deposits. Users deposit ZCHF to earn interest, which is minted by the contract as an active minter.

funds.name: StablecoinBridge (VCHF)
funds.description: Bridge contract holding $501.29K in VCHF reserves. These reserves back ZCHF minted through the VCHF-to-ZCHF bridge path.

funds.name: MintingHub (Legacy Positions)
funds.description: The older MintingHub with $0 in 2 remaining WBTC collateral positions. No longer used for new position creation.

funds.name: Savings (Legacy)
funds.description: The older Savings contract holding $21.39K in remaining ZCHF deposits.

codeAndAudits.title: Code & Audits
codeAndAudits.description: Smart contract analysis and audit history
